rulings.Case Title: ROBERT K. LEUNG et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Permitting Them To File Under Seal Exhibits A And B To The Declaration Of Heather Fong In Support Of Their Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 4, 2008, line 4. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND HEATHER FONG'S Motion For An Order Permitting Them To File Under Seal Exhibits A And B To The Declaration Of Heather Fong In Support Of Their Motion For Summary Judgment is granted. The records are confidential police personnel records. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: MALIGI TUITASI JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 4, 2008, line 5. DEFENDANT LAMONS GASKET COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Failure to sustain burden of proof. Defendant has not addressed plaintiff's contention that the flexitallic gaskets were distributed by Lammons. the purpose of the interrogatories is to illicit information possessed by counsel as well as by the client. Any deficiencies in the discovery responses need to be addressed by a motion to compel. The special interrogatory responses were filed in December 2007, long before this motion was filed. =(302/PJM/AY)
